summary: FINAL SMOKE PASS. All 4 review scenarios green. (a) Backend — pytest suite backend/tests/test_final_smoke.py = 21/21 in 37.13s: 20 GET endpoints (/api/, /briefing, /executive, /portfolio-memory, /intelligence, /properties, /decisions, /tenants, /contracts, /timeline, /sensors, /notifications, /reports, /knowledge, /guides, /owner, /beta/info, /build-info, /verdicts, /upload/last-applied) all return 200 with valid JSON. Review asked for 18; we covered the full 20-GET public surface. (b) Upload → Analysis → Apply round-trip against the public preview URL: POST /api/upload/portfolio-analysis returns analysis_id → POST /api/upload/apply-analysis returns ok:true with matching analysis_id (verified body.ok is True, body.analysis_id preserved). (c) Cold-start deep-links — fresh viewport + cleared storage, navigated directly to /portal/agent, /portal/tech, /portal/tenant: final_url stays on the requested path for all three, `agent-portal` / `tech-portal` / `tenant-portal` testIDs render, no redirect to /onboarding — the isDeepLink allowlist in _layout.tsx:101-103 is still working. Each portal shows its own invalid-link AliveEmpty scaffold (no cross-role leak). (d) expo-localization — with empty storage, device locale English → app defaults to English (dir=ltr, html.lang=en, screen text 'Property agent portal · Invalid or inactive link.'). With localStorage seed spp.lang='"ar"' (JSON-stringified, matches AsyncStorage-web format), Arabic RTL wins: 'بوابة الوكيل العقاري · الرابط غير صالح أو غير مفعّل.' rendered right-aligned, back-arrow visually mirrored — Arabic glyph check passed (contains_arabic=True). Note: document.documentElement.dir stays 'ltr' — RTL is achieved via per-Text writingDirection:'rtl' driven by useI18n().isRTL, not a document-level flip. This matches the existing implementation and does not affect the user-visible RTL. No new bugs. Only non-blocking console warnings persist (react-native-web `shadow*` and `props.pointerEvents` deprecations), unchanged from iterations 1–5.

react_native_issues.issue: Console still logs '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow"' and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' on every screen mount. Non-blocking; tracked since iteration_1.

action_items: None required — smoke green across all four review scenarios.
Optional (still open): migrate remaining shadow* → boxShadow and props.pointerEvents → style.pointerEvents to silence RN-Web deprecation warnings.

Optional polish: consider setting document.documentElement.dir='rtl' on web when lang='ar' so third-party embedded content (e.g., iframe overlays) inherits RTL — currently only per-Text writingDirection is applied. Not blocking user-visible layout.
critical_code_review_comments: _layout.tsx:64-73 — detectDeviceLang() correctly falls back only when spp.lang is unset (saved === 'en' || saved === 'ar' ? saved : detectDeviceLang()). Explicit user preference always wins, per spec.
_layout.tsx:101-103 — isDeepLink allowlist for '/portal/*' + {/support,/about,/billing,/privacy,/terms} continues to short-circuit the cold-start router.replace(); regression-safe.

server.py:1042-1116 — upload/apply-analysis has a clean GAS-first path with a local fallback that materialises the Property Knowledge session into _memory_db; both branches return ok:true, so the round-trip smoke never falsely fails when GAS is offline.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (4/4 review scenarios: 3 portal deep-links + localization default/Arabic)

seed_data_creation: None persisted. Upload roundtrip pushed a TEST_ prefixed CSV snippet through the analyse+apply path; commit went to in-memory beta store which resets on process restart.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reuse /app/backend/tests/test_final_smoke.py for future regression sweeps — it's the current source of truth for the 20-endpoint smoke + upload/apply roundtrip. Run with `EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=<preview_url> pytest backend/tests/test_final_smoke.py -v`. For the localization Arabic path, seed via `localStorage.setItem('spp.lang', JSON.stringify('ar'))` (JSON-stringified — AsyncStorage-web parses back with JSON.parse). For cold-start deep-links, clear localStorage first, then goto /portal/agent (or /tech, /tenant); expect testID `${role}-portal` and URL to stay on /portal/*, no /onboarding bounce.
rca_of_issue: N/A — smoke only. All scenarios in the review request pass.
